steps.title: Spot the evidence of success
steps.content: The passage establishes that the Kwakwaka'wakw terraced clam gardens corresponded with increased clam size and abundance despite greater harvesting pressure.

steps.title: Interpret what the success demonstrates
steps.content:
The success demonstrates that if the clam ecotypes are locally adapted, their adaptation encompasses the full environmental context created by the Kwakwaka'wakw—not water alone, but the terraced structures, substrate, current patterns, and ecological niche.

The other choices introduce unsupported claims, deny the evident success, or mischaracterize the study. That matches choice B — B is correct.
